name: Cranberry Kuchen
recipeInstructions:
1. Cream the margarine and 1 cup of granulated sugar in a large bowl with an electric mixer until smooth.
2. Add vanilla, then eggs one at a time, beating until light and fluffy after each addition.
3. In a separate bowl, combine flour, baking powder, baking soda, and salt.
4. Gradually add the dry ingredients to the creamed mixture, alternating with sour cream, ending with the dry ingredients for a thick batter.
5. Gently fold in chopped cranberries with the remaining 1/4 cup of sugar.
6. Pour half of the batter into a greased 10-inch springform pan and sprinkle with cranberries.
7. Top with the remaining batter.
8. In another small bowl, combine brown sugar, flour, almonds, margarine, and cinnamon for the topping.
9. Sprinkle the topping over the batter.
10. Bake at 350°F for 50 to 55 minutes. Serve warm or at room temperature.
